title: The Crick COVID-19 RT-PCR Testing Pipeline
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dsail","text":"The Crick COVID-19 Consortium commenced on 19 March 2020 in response to the emerging COVID-19 pandemic in a collaboration between University College London Hospitals, Health Services Laboratory (HSL), the Institute of Cancer Research and the Francis Crick Institute.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"brj10","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4fmqb","text":"Over 2 weeks, the consortium has set up a high throughput RT-PCR COVID-19 diagnostics assay in an academic environment. The work is conducted at the Francis Crick Institute as an extension of the accredited laboratories at HSL. The aim has been to minimise dependencies on reagents, in short supply globally, to provide resilience to the pipeline and provide a scale-able platform to screen hundreds to thousands of healthcare workers and patients per day.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9dqj1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"213nn","text":"The interactive Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) provide in this collection a step-by-step approach to set up a diagnostic pipeline in an academic institute in collaboration with partner laboratories and hospital trusts.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"crhcq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7v7c9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1fs6a","text":"--","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"20pj7","text":"The members of the Crick COVID-19 Consortium would like to thank Julia Roßmanith, Friedrich-Alexander Universität Erlangen-Nürnberg, for her assistance with the editing of this collection of protocols.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3h88e","text":"COVID-19 testing approach","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"37o03","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6juoh","text":"The COVID-19 testing approach was developed from the outset as a partnership, and all processes have been established in the Crick COVID-19 diagnostic testing pipeline through close coordination with the NHS trust diagnostic laboratory. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"98ep4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"885t8","text":"The Crick approach is based on five main work-streams, that were developed and tested independently, and are therefore largely standalone. The approach relies on highly trained research staff to support a semi-automated, but not highly integrated, pathway. The advantage is that the approach is agile and can make use of lab-space distributed across a research institution. Such a set-up is highly dependent on shift-work to maximise sample throughput, particularly with respect to sample reception, tracking and viral inactivation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5vetq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ek74j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4sssn","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dt7e","text":"The Crick COVID-19 RT-PCR Testing Pipeline workflow ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":52}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fps22","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9j7ke","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dikdc","text":"1.
